$comment: Each path corresponds to a task in tasks.md (T.3-T.11). Together they cover every transition in state_model.json (Transition Coverage). Paths are executed by agent-browser against pnpm --filter web dev:local + local Supabase Docker, signed-in with the user-auth client.

paths.name: Happy path on own page (desktop viewport)
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL: navigate to /user; assert search icon visible
T_OPEN_SEARCH: click search icon
SEARCH_MODE_IDLE: assert sticky header, input focused, settings icon hidden
T_TYPE_TWO_CHARS: type '오늘' (2 Hangul syllables)
SEARCH_MODE_LOADING: brief skeleton render (~300ms debounce)
T_LOAD_TO_RESULTS: assert '오늘의 작성' post is among results
T_RESULTS_TO_DETAIL: click '오늘의 작성' card
POST_DETAIL: assert URL /board/<bid>/post/<pid>
T_DETAIL_BACK_TO_NORMAL: browser back
OWN_PAGE_NORMAL: assert profile + posts list re-rendered, no search input visible

paths.name: Match past 500-char preview boundary
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL → SEARCH_MODE_IDLE → type 'BODYNEEDLE'
SEARCH_MODE_RESULTS: assert the 1500-char-body post (BODYNEEDLE at offset 1000) is present
paths.rationale: Verifies API uses full content (not content_preview) in WHERE

paths.name: 50-result cap with newest-first ordering
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL → SEARCH_MODE_IDLE → type 'LIMITNEEDLE'
SEARCH_MODE_RESULTS_CAPPED: assert exactly 50 cards, cap-notice visible, created_at non-increasing top→bottom, oldest 10 absent

paths.name: Cross-user isolation (no leak from search)
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL → SEARCH_MODE_IDLE → type 'ALPHA_ONLY' (user B's unique phrase)
SEARCH_MODE_EMPTY: assert zero result cards
paths.rationale: Confirms .eq('author_id', userA) + RLS prevent cross-user matches

paths.name: Mobile viewport keyboard
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL → SEARCH_MODE_IDLE → focus input → show keyboard
Assert input still in visible viewport bottom region

paths.name: Empty state
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL → SEARCH_MODE_IDLE → type a string that matches no posts
SEARCH_MODE_EMPTY: assert '<query>'에 일치하는 글이 없습니다.' rendered

paths.name: Escape-to-exit
steps: OWN_PAGE_NORMAL → SEARCH_MODE_IDLE → press Escape on input
OWN_PAGE_NORMAL: assert search closed; document.activeElement === search icon button

paths.name: Other user's page
steps: OTHER_USER_PAGE: navigate to /user/<user-B-id>
Assert no search icon, no input, header is null

paths.name: RLS defense-in-depth (Layer 4 security contract)
steps: From browser console (or a small test hook), invoke searchOwnPosts(<user-B-id>, 'ALPHA_ONLY')
Assert result is either [] or only B's visibility='public' posts; never B's private posts
paths.rationale: Load-bearing security check; the search-my-posts-only invariant
